sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25727" key="diarrafh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαρρᾰφή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n25727.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sewing up,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
